name: Canyon Resources Limited
summary: Canyon Resources Limited, together with its subsidiaries, explores for bauxite and gold properties in West Africa. It primarily focuses on the 100% owned Minim Martap Bauxite project that comprises two deposits covering an area of 1,349 square kilometers located in the Adamawa region of Cameroon, central Africa. The company was formerly known as Castlemaine Resources Limited and changed its name to Canyon Resources Limited in March 2010. Canyon Resources Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Perth, Australia.
